channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Generative AI Revolution: A Material Impact on the Information We Encounter Daily
item.description: A new study published in Cornell University's preprint server arXiv reveals that the ease of use of generative AI models is having a material impact on the information we encounter daily, as OpenAI rolled out its GPT-4.5 model to paying ChatGPT users and competitors announced their own latest models.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Samsung Signs Agreement with YMTC to Use Hybrid Bonding Tech for 400-Layer NAND Production
item.description: Samsung Electronics has signed a contract with Yangtze Memory Technologies Co. (YMTC) to use its hybrid bonding technology in the production of its 400-layer NAND flash memory, potentially preventing infringement claims and influenced by US-China trade tensions.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
